# crates/attractor-web/src

Leptos WASM web frontend crate entry point. `main.rs` defines the Axum HTTP server with SSR builds. `lib.rs` re-exports `App` component and conditionally exports `hydrate()`. `app.rs` renders the multi-project workspace with sidebar and project views, loading projects via `list_open_projects()` server function.

## Contents

[app.rs](./app.rs) — `App` root component using `RwSignal<Vec<Project>>` and `RwSignal<Option<i64>>` for multi-project workspace state. `Resource` calls `list_open_projects()` on mount. `<For>` iterates projects with `is_active()` display toggling. Empty state when `projects.get().is_empty()`.

[lib.rs](./lib.rs) — Crate root re-exporting `App` component and `server` module. `hydrate()` fn (gated by `hydrate` feature) calls `console_error_panic_hook::set_once()` then `leptos::mount::hydrate_body(App)`. `ssr` feature guards server module exports. Produces both `["cdylib", "rlib"]` crate types.

[main.rs](./main.rs) — Axum server entry point. SSR builds initialize `AppState { db, watchers, terminal_sessions }` and bind routes: `/api/terminal/ws` → `ws_terminal`, `/api/documents/stream` → `document_stream`, `/api/stream/{session_id}` → `stream_events`. Falls back to `leptos_axum::file_and_error_handler(shell)`. Non-SSR builds produce `pub fn main() {}`.

## Stack

- **Frontend**: Leptos reactive components, WASM, xterm.js PTY
- **Backend**: Axum, sqlx/SQLite, notify file watchers, portable-pty
- **Build**: `ssr` feature for server build, `hydrate` feature for SSR hydration
- **Features**: `cdylib` (WASM), `rlib` (native), `ssr` (Axum), `hydrate` (WASM hydration)

## Subdirectories

[components/](./components/) — Leptos UI component library: sidebar, document viewer, execution panel, terminal, approval bar. See [components/AGENTS.md](./components/AGENTS.md).

[server/](./server/) — Server-side SSR modules: SQLite persistence, file watching, SSE streaming, WebSocket PTY, Leptos `#[server]` functions. See [server/AGENTS.md](./server/AGENTS.md).

## Integration

- `app.rs` imports `ProjectView` from `crate::components::layout`, `ProjectSidebar` from `crate::components::project_sidebar`, `list_open_projects` and `Project` from `crate::server::projects`
- `main.rs` initializes SQLite via `attractor_web::server::db::init_db()` and provides `SqlitePool` via `provide_context(pool.clone())`
- Crate path in workspace: `crate::components` and `crate::server` namespaces from `lib.rs` re-exports

## Patterns

- **Feature-gated builds**: `ssr` disables main, `hydrate` enables WASM hydration
- **Reactive workspace**: `RwSignal` at root propagates to child components via context
- **Display toggling**: `is_active()` gates CSS `display` style per project
